summary: Seth Rollins returned to Good Morning Football on Friday and revealed that his walk-off from the show the previous day had been staged. title: Billy Gunn discusses wrestling retirement: ‘I’m still having fun’
summary: At 62-years-old, Billy Gunn has no concrete plans on retiring. During an interview with Chris Van Vliet, Billy Gunn was asked if he plans to wrestle until 70.
